name: All Purpose 3 Drawer Storage Clear - Brightroom™
description:
Arrange your stationery, cosmetics and more with this All Purpose 3 Drawer Storage from Brightroom™. This all-purpose storage includes three bins for storing different types of items, from staplers to notepads to scissors and more. A slide-out design makes it easy to pull open no matter where you place it, and the clear construction matches any color scheme while also letting you see what you've stored inside. Whether organizing your living area or home office, this all-purpose drawer organizer is a smart and practical pick.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
